productDisplayName: Maxima Ssteele Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: Black textured dial, white and steel colour markings, steel colour hands with white accents, branding near the 12 hour mark and 6 hour mark, date display near the 3 hour mark Strap style: Perforated rubber strap with a tang closure, adjustable for a snug fit, two loops to hold the strap in place Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
